inputs.name: plan
inputs.description: Execute a compiled JEDI run plan after explicit input materialization.

outputs.name: run
outputs.description: Return command, evidence, and status for schema, validate_only, or real_run execution.

provides.name: jedi.schema.generate
provides.description: Run a JEDI executable in schema mode and archive the emitted schema.

provides.name: jedi.validate_only.run
provides.description: Run a JEDI executable in validate_only mode and archive validation evidence.

provides.name: jedi.real_run.run
provides.description: Run a JEDI executable in real_run mode and archive runtime evidence.
